name: repo-radar
description: AI-First Repository Analysis & Agent Orchestration Platform

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace server
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
